The '''''Thrackan Sal-Solo''''' was a [[Corellian Dreadnaught]] built around [[Kiris 6]] that would later serve as the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the [[Confederation]] fleet.

==History==
''Thrackan Sal-Solo'' was the flagship of the secret assault fleet constructed by [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] over the course of the decade following the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. It was named after [[Chief of State (Corellia)|Chief of State]] [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]], who was later assassinated in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]].

Though the vessel was named ''Thrackan Sal-Solo'' it seems more likely that it was not christened after his death, but when the fleet was first constructed, as Thrackan was largely disliked by his peers, and naming the flagship after him could be seen as honoring him.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{1st}}
